title: MNQ® Dog Ball Launcher (Pack Of 2), Dog Ball Launcher Thrower - Toys for Dogs - Ball Thrower Assorted Colours With 2 Tennis Balls
features: ❗IMPORTANT- We have LISTENED to your FEEDBACK and UPDATED our balls to the highest quality of tennis balls - Perfect for your beloved DOG!
🖐️Hands-Free Play --MNQ dog ball launcher (PACK OF 2) Launch your balls while keeping your hands clean! No more bending down to collect muddy and slimy balls.
🏕️Play Anytime, Anywhere -- Whether it's a park outing or a lazy day indoors, endless fun is just a launch away!
🥎Universal Design -- This Portable dog ball thrower is also compatible with any regular tennis ball.
🐾Comfortable - The grip of this dog ball launcher fits perfectly and comfortably in your hand.
🐕Durable Material -- MNQ Improvised quality dog ball launcher is made up of the best plastic material and are perfect for indoor/outdoor play with your dog.
🐶Pet Training -- Stay active and bond with your pet! Challenge your pup to run further and faster with this dog throwing stick.
🟦Attractive Colors🟥 -- This dog toy comes in attractive bright assorted colors, long lasting and durable.
🗈Note -- You can check product images for better understanding.
description: Product Description: "While Playing with Our Dog Ball Launcher Dogs Loves to Run and Chase" MNQ provide best of the best IMPROVISED QUALITY dog ball launcher perfect for indoor/outdoor play with your dog. The grip on the end makes it easy to pick up and launch muddy and slimy balls without getting your hands dirty. This allows you to throw the ball further than normal. It encourages your dog to exercise, and there’s no better way to play than playing fetch. Dogs always loves to run and chase while playing with ball launcher, this activity is make sure to keep them engaged at any age. The attractive color of ball will attract the attention of dog. Dog ball thrower makes the ball bounce at random direction to attract your pet attention and exercise their ability of chasing, searching and hunting. A good gift for your lovely pets, these tennis balls for dogs with good elasticity are suitable for dog training and interactive activities, you can throw the balls out and asking your dog to bring them back, literally you will be happy by seeing your dog interest in this game, you can use this toy while swimming as well. Product Features: .Durable Quality .No more dirty Hands .Increase Throwing Power .Handy Grip .Flexible Plastic .Bright high visible colors .Healthy and funny Pack Contain: 2 Quality Dog Ball Launchers with 2 Improvised Quality Tennis Balls
